block_03: Netflix confirmed partnership talks for ad-supported service on Thursday. Media reports from earlier this week said it was in discussions with Alphabet Inc's Google and Comcast Corp's NBCUniversal for potential marketing tie-ups.
block_07: Wall Street will be looking for positivity from Pinterest as it approaches its next earnings report date. The company is expected to report EPS of $0.19 – plus 14% this week.
block_10: The stocks plunged 15% in one week after surprising the market with a guidance cut – the company's shares are currently trading below $30.
